headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Underperform on Clorox, Lowers Price Target to $98
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Javier Escalante   maintains Clorox (NYSE:CLX) with a Underperform and lowers the price target from $110 to $98.
